news.title: @ ricci@discuss.systems Fascinating thread – thanks for taking all the effort! I wonder if…
news.author: dialecticalmusings@app.wafrn.net
news.snippet: @ ricci@discuss.systems Fascinating thread – thanks for taking all the effort! I wonder if you have read Andy Masley's multiple blog posts on this topic, and if yes, written/commented anything in response. It seems common among pro-AI and pro-datacentre circles to cite his blog posts in support of their arguments. These posts on the environmental effects of ChatGPT use , on AI water use , on datacentre land use are some of the samples, but there seem to be many more on his blog . I am asking out of idle curiosity (I haven't dug into those posts myself), so ignore if you are busy. :-) #AI #ArtificialIntelligence #DataCenters #DataCenter #DataCentres #DataCentre
